evals.prompt: Review my working diff — a new checkout API route with input validation and a repository call.
evals.expected_output: Structured verdict with change summary, effort rating, findings grouped by action label, and AC coverage. No source files modified.
assertions: Emits Result, Risk level, Scope reviewed, Review effort in the header
Includes a Change summary section before the findings
Every finding is prefixed with [blocking], [warning], or [suggestion]
Every finding carries Category | Severity | Confidence
Every finding cites file path and line
Modifies no file outside .agency/reviews/
Closes by pointing at code-review-fix rather than offering to fix

evals.prompt: Review this one-line lockfile bump PR.
evals.expected_output: Eligibility gate skips or reduces the review; no sub-agents spawned.
assertions: Does not spawn the full sub-agent set
States why the review was skipped or reduced in one line
Does not manufacture findings to justify the run

evals.prompt: Review the branch — it adds a migration that drops a column and backfills a new one.
evals.expected_output: Rated L effort on the data path. Data Integrity findings on reversibility and backfill safety.
assertions: Rates review effort L because a data path is touched, regardless of diff size
Raises at least one Data Integrity category finding
Checks migration reversibility and rollback path
Checks backfill is batched, resumable, and safe to re-run
Applies the Data Integrity severity floors (irreversible migration → Critical)

evals.prompt: Review this diff. It has a regex passed to a test matcher, and a SQL query built from a request parameter.
evals.expected_output: SQL injection raised as blocking. Test-matcher regex not raised as ReDoS.
assertions: Raises the SQL injection as Security, blocking
Does NOT raise ReDoS on the test-matcher regex
Traces input provenance before raising either
Cites a CWE or OWASP identifier for the injection finding

evals.prompt: Re-review the branch — I've pushed two commits since your last review, and I disagreed with the retry-loop finding.
evals.expected_output: Incremental review of the delta only. Dismissed finding not re-raised. Delta reported.
assertions: Reads .agency/reviews/{branch}.json and reviews from the recorded SHA
Does not re-raise the dismissed retry-loop finding for unchanged code
Includes a 'Since last review' section with fixed / still open / newly introduced
Updates the review state file with the new head SHA

evals.prompt: Review this large refactor — it spans 40 files, adds two modules, and touches the auth middleware.
evals.expected_output: L effort, parallel sub-agents, merged and verified findings.
assertions: Spawns sub-agents in parallel rather than reviewing serially
Spawns architecture-reviewer (new modules) and a security-focused pass (auth)
Resolves Review Context once and shares it — no per-agent re-fetching
Deduplicates findings raised by more than one agent into a single entry
Raises confidence where independent agents corroborate the same defect
Runs finding-verifier per candidate before assigning action labels
